data.name: Hentai Clicker: Alerinna is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Alerinna is streaming

Step into a realm of mystery and seduction where Alerinna, your alluring silver-haired elf, reacts to your every move. Click, flirt, and reveal her magical secrets—one heart and one outfit at a time…

🍃 About the Game

Prepare for a seductive blend of ecchi clicker gameplay and elven charm. Every click brings you closer to Alerinna’s intimate world, where forbidden magic meets sensual discovery. Collect hearts to unlock enchanted outfits, animations, and voice lines that grow steamier as your bond deepens.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

Hentai Clicker: Alerinna is streaming features uncensored, explicit NSFW scenes—from slow, teasing foreplay to magical climaxes only elves could conjure.

🎉 Features

🎨 Enchanting Fantasy Visuals – A stunning anime art style that brings Alerinna to life.
🌙 Mysterious Elven Waifu – Elegant, untouchable, yet deeply tempting.
🖱️ Clicker Gameplay – Simple, addictive, and oh-so-satisfying.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From mystical robes to barely-there magical lingerie.
🔊 Voice Acting & Dialogue – She reacts to your touches with breathy whispers and enchanted moans.
🚀 Goals – Collect more hearts to reach deeper, harder, and more intimate scenes.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Whether you’re here for the magical elf fantasy, the naughty progression, or the beautiful anime aesthetics, Alerinna delivers a replayable, spicy experience. She’s not just another character—she’s your forbidden obsession.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap brings you closer to her next reveal.
🔓 Unlock Scenes – Spend hearts to unlock new outfits, poses, and steamy moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost your pace and dive into Alerinna’s secrets faster.

🌿 Start Your Elven Adventure Now!

She’s live, she’s waiting, and she’s ready to cast her spell.
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Alerinna is streaming—and let her take your breath away.

data.short_description: 🔞 Step into a lewd adventure with Hentai Clicker: Alerinna is streaming! 🌿 Click to collect hearts, unlock magical outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive clicker game. Enjoy stunning fantasy anime art, explicit content, and immersive voice acting with your favorite elven beauty!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 韓文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
